# MuleSoft NetSuite OpenAir Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.0) of NetSuite OpenAir Connector documentation.
> See [NetSuite OpenAir Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/netsuite-openair-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the NetSuite OpenAir Connector documentation in one file.
